passives.name: Coordinated Fire
passives.effects: Abilities that {{tip|slow}} or {{tip|immobilize}} enemy champions mark them for 5 seconds. Allied champions that damage marked enemies consume the mark to deal {{as|10% of the target's '''current''' health}} {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}} (9 second cooldown per target, shared between all users of '''Imperial Mandate'''; starts upon mark application).

effects_structured.raw: Abilities that {{tip slow}} or {{tip immobilize}} enemy champions mark them for 5 seconds

Allied champions that damage marked enemies consume the mark to deal {{as 10% of the target's '''current''' health}} {{as '''bonus''' magic damage}} (9 second cooldown per target, shared between all users of '''Imperial Mandate'''

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution model: A champion ability that slows or immobilizes an enemy champion applies Imperial Mandate mark for 5 seconds.
Execution model: Ally damage to a marked target consumes the mark and applies bonus magic damage based on target current health.
Limiter semantics: The 9-second cooldown is per target, shared between all Imperial Mandate users, and starts when mark is first applied.

sources.name: Data Dragon item dataset
sources.used_for: baseline item identity, stat block, and raw effect text

sources.name: CommunityDragon items dataset
sources.used_for: secondary validation against canonical static item data mirror
local ingestion snapshot used during structured effect authoring

sources.name: League Wiki (Imperial Mandate)
sources.used_for: page-level verification of mark duration, ally consume behavior, and per-target shared cooldown start timing
